user.title: Connect to Sendspin BT Bridge
user.description:
Enter the bridge's host and port. **Leave the token blank to auto-pair on HAOS** — the bridge will mint a token via Supervisor automatically. If auto-pair is unavailable, open the bridge web UI and pick **Configuration → Home Assistant → Access tokens (HACS only) → Generate token**.

_To connect several bridges, run this flow once per bridge — each one shows up separately under Settings → Devices & Services._

pair.title: Sendspin BT Bridge discovered at {host}:{port}
pair.description:
{ui_url_block}In the bridge web UI go to **Configuration → Home Assistant → Access tokens (HACS only) → Generate token**, then paste the token below.

_Discovered multiple bridges?  Run this step for each — Home Assistant treats every bridge as a separate config entry._

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Sendspin BT Bridge
reauth_confirm.description: Your bearer token was rejected. {ui_url_block}In the bridge web UI go to **Configuration → Home Assistant → Access tokens (HACS only) → Generate token** to mint a fresh one, then paste it below.

error.auth_failed: Token rejected — make sure it was just minted and not revoked.
error.auto_pair_failed: Could not auto-pair via Supervisor — paste a token from the bridge web UI (Configuration → Home Assistant → Access tokens (HACS only) → Generate token).

abort.missing_host_id: Bridge mDNS advertisement is missing the host_id TXT record.
